sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88778" key="prosbaqu/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσβᾰθύνω</orth>, <sense id="n88778.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make still deeper</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:11:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.11.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
